_comment: For Claude Code on the WEB (ephemeral containers) OR any repo where you want per-project capture, commit this as `.claude/settings.json` in that repo. Because web containers are wiped on recycle, CLAUDE_KB_PUSH must be 1 and CLAUDE_KB_DIR must point at a checked-out clone of your (ideally private) knowledge-base repo so the entry is pushed before the container dies. Adjust the paths for the web working directory.
